original: Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes, I... I'll do that. Menes. He is a kind man."
translated: Pond a l'air accablé, mais il hoche la tête. "Oui, je... je ferai ça. Menes. C'est un homme bon."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."
original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.
translated: Fichez le camp d'ici. Et si vous ne le dites pas à Menes, je le ferai.

original: Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes, I... I'll do that. Menes will understand why I had to do... what I had to do."
translated: Pond a l'air accablé, mais il hoche la tête. "Oui, je... je ferai ça. Menes comprendra pourquoi j'ai dû faire... ce que j'ai dû faire."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."
original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.
translated: Fichez le camp d'ici. Et si vous ne le dites pas à Menes, je le ferai.

original: Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes." Another cough. "Menes, kind."
translated: Pond a l'air accablé, mais il hoche la tête. "Oui." Une autre quinte de toux. "Menes, bon."

original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.
translated: Fichez le camp d'ici. Et si vous ne le dites pas à Menes, je le ferai.

original: Pond looks stricken, but he nods. "Yes. Menes." Another cough. "Will understand."
translated: Pond a l'air accablé, mais il hoche la tête. "Oui. Menes." Une autre quinte de toux. "Comprendra."

option_line: bffi_ulmusTalkNoSedgeOut2menes:"Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will."
original: Get out of here. And if you don't tell Menes, I will.
translated: Fichez le camp d'ici. Et si vous ne le dites pas à Menes, je le ferai.

original:
Bornanew looks at you, then to Pond. His expression softens, just a little.

"Captain," he says. "They will kill him for his failure. And not well. Let me turn him over to the Knights. They will offer him a path to redemption, harsh though it may be."
translated:
Bornanew vous regarde, puis se tourne vers Pond. Son expression s'adoucit, juste un peu.

"Capitaine," dit-il. "Ils le tueront pour son échec. Et pas de manière douce. Laissez-moi le remettre aux Chevaliers. Ils lui offriront un chemin vers la rédemption, aussi dur soit-il."

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2knights:"As you like, $global.jethroName. Pond is your responsibility."
original: As you like, $global.jethroName. Pond is your responsibility.
translated: Comme vous voulez, $global.jethroName. Pond est sous votre responsabilité.
